arts.ttl: Diego Simeone explains thoughts on ‘failure’ before facing Barcelona in season-defining semi-final
arts.sum: “The team has competed very well so far, in the Champions League we competed very well, in the cup as well, we are having a good league season and we will continue game by game. I repeat that we have been good in the Champions League, in the cup, we lost 4-5 against a rival that plays very well and deserved to go through, and in the league we are competing well and we will continue in the same way.

arts.ttl: “My knee was in a completely different position” – Barcelona star opens up on horror injury
arts.sum: It has been a tremendous season for Barcelona up until now, and it is made more impressive considering they have been without their captain for almost the entire campaign. Back in September, Marc-Andre Ter Stegen suffered a serious knee injury after a freak incident during Barcelona’s 5-1 victory over Villarreal at La Ceramica. The German […] The post “My knee was in a completely different position” – Barcelona star opens up on horror injury appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Torres sends Barcelona past Atlético and into clásico Copa del Rey final
arts.sum: Semi-final: Atlético Madrid 0-1 Barcelona (agg 4-5) Barça v Real Madrid final for first time since 2014 A decade later, the Copa del Rey will have a clásico final. First Barcelona played, then they resisted and in the end it was enough to see them through. A wild first leg, 4-4 at Montjuic, gave way to a tense and ultimately tight second in which a single Ferran Torres goal scored in the first half won it. Seville awaits Hansi Flick’s side, two teams still chasing a treble set to meet again, a third and final trophy denied to Atlético. In the five weeks since the first leg of this semi-final, a superb season slipped away from Diego Simeone’s side. Atlético won just one of five games since then, and that was the Champions League second leg in which they were knocked out on penalties. They also slipped to nine points off the top in La Liga. And now, their cup run is over too. They had taken their opponents to the line but could not get over it themselves. Barcelona could. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Yamal left with bloodied ankle after Lenglet challenge
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal was left bloodied by Clement Lenglet during Barcelona’s Copa del Rey tie with Atletico Madrid on Wednesday night . Yamal was then crunched by Lenglet in the second half and was left bleeding by the Barcelona loanee.

arts.ttl: What happened the last time Barcelona faced Real Madrid in the Copa del Rey final?
arts.sum: The next edition of the biggest rivalry in Spanish football was officially pencilled in on Wednesday night. This comes after Barcelona booked their spot in the finale of the Copa…

arts.ttl: Barcelona book El Clásico Copa del Rey final against Real Madrid
arts.sum: Barcelona will face Real Madrid in the Copa del Rey final after a 1-0 win over Atletico Madrid. Ferran Torres scored the only goal of the game in the Spanish capital to keep the Catalan’s dream of a treble alive this season. Torres’ goal earned Barcelona a 5-4 aggregate win and Hansi Flick’s side will […] The post Barcelona book El Clásico Copa del Rey final against Real Madrid first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid 0-1 Barcelona (agg 4-5): Ferran Torres goal sets up El Clasico Copa del Rey final
arts.sum: Barcelona overcome Atletico Madrid to set up an El Clasico Copa del Rey final

arts.ttl: Espanyol eyeing summer deal for ex-Barcelona talent
arts.sum: La Liga outfit Espanyol have identified one of the standout performers in Spain’s 2nd tier as a potential transfer target for next season. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, citing Canal…

arts.ttl: Barcelona gets past Atletico to reach Copa del Rey final against Real Madrid
arts.sum: The rivals will meet in the Copa decider for the first time since the 2013-14 season, when Madrid won the title. Barcelona won 1-0 at Atletico Madrid to reach its first Copa del Rey final in four seasons on Wednesday, setting up a “clasico” against Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Photos: Barcelona stars left battered & bruised by heavy Atlético challenges
